items.briefing:
Australia's communications regulator, ACMA, has announced its compliance priorities for 2026–27, with a focus on protecting consumers from harmful online activity — relevant to all Australian organisations that communicate digitally with clients or the public. Separately, cybersecurity researchers are warning that attackers are increasingly targeting education technology *suppliers* rather than schools directly, meaning training organisations like ours could be at risk through third-party software or platforms we rely on.

**Practical tip:** Review the third-party apps and platforms your organisation uses for learning delivery, and check that your vendors have clear security and data protection policies in place.

featured.title: In AI, control is the real advantage
featured.quote: Australian firms risk losing AI competitive advantage if core models remain controlled offshore.
